narrative:
Harrison Township D (precinct in Licking County) has 1,633 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.1 percentage points.
